title: Consolidate CFW/Seminar Workflow and Refine Payout Logic
goal: Simplify the CFW/Seminar module by unifying event creation, removing redundant UI elements, and ensuring payout logic strictly follows attendance records.
verification: Verify 'Seminar' button is removed from sidebar.
Verify 'Create Event' panel has an Event Type selector.
Verify Payout Summary only includes people with attendance records.
notes: Story: User clicks 'Create Event' -> chooses CFW or Seminar -> Assigns people -> Scans them -> Payout calculates ONLY scanned people.
Terminology: Move away from 'OCR' in UI labels towards 'Attendance & Payouts'.
